productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Formal Shoes
description: These formal shoes are the most fashionable way to to get formal with comfort. This pair of formal shoes from lee cooper is a fashion forward choice which will give all-day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal trousers, a full sleeve shirt and a coordinating belt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced textured overlay from the mid-foot to the heel for durability Lace-up system for a snug customised Fit Diagonal stitch detailing from the mid-foot to the forefoot for enhanced style Soft sock-liner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the mid-foot Mid-sole Shock absorbing EVA mid-sole Out-sole TPR out-sole with a scooped heel Textured out-sole for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
